options.content:
## Alert Tuning
Proposal-only threshold evidence for disabled Azure Monitor rules. Keep action groups off until thresholds are validated against real history.

azureLogAnalytics.query: let hourly = AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), ''), fallback_session=strcat(iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['service.name'])), tostring(Properties['service.name']), iff(isnotempty(AppRoleName), AppRoleName, 'agent'))), '_', iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), iff(isnotempty(OperationId), OperationId, 'session')), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm')) | join kind=leftouter (AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), '') | where isnotempty(direct_session) | summarize operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), iff(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) startswith 'azure-mcp-', 'azure-mcp', '')), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type'])  | extend AIU=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.aiu']), Credits=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.cost']) | summarize Spans=count(), Failures=countif(Success == false or tostring(Success) =~ 'false' or isnotempty(error)), ToolFailures=countif((operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool)) and (Success == false or tostring(Success) =~ 'false' or isnotempty(error))), ToolCalls=countif(operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool)), AIU=sum(AIU), Credits=sum(Credits) by conversation, TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, 1h); let content = union isfuzzy=true AppDependencies, AppTraces | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | summarize ContentCaptureSignals=countif(tostring(Properties['agentops.content_capture.signal']) =~ 'true' or tostring(Properties) has_any ('gen_ai.input.messages', 'gen_ai.output.messages', 'gen_ai.prompt', 'gen_ai.completion', 'github.copilot.message')) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h); let session_rollup = hourly | summarize Hours=count(), P50Aiu=percentile(AIU, 50), P95Aiu=percentile(AIU, 95), P99Aiu=percentile(AIU, 99), MaxAiu=max(AIU), P95Failures=percentile(Failures, 95), MaxFailures=max(Failures), P95ToolFailures=percentile(ToolFailures, 95), MaxToolFailures=max(ToolFailures), P95ToolCalls=percentile(ToolCalls, 95), MaxToolCalls=max(ToolCalls), P95Credits=percentile(Credits, 95), MaxCredits=max(Credits); let content_rollup = content | summarize ContentCaptureHours=countif(ContentCaptureSignals > 0), MaxContentCaptureSignals=max(ContentCaptureSignals); union (session_rollup | extend SuggestedThreshold=case(P99Aiu * 1.25 > P95Aiu * 2.0, todouble(P99Aiu * 1.25), todouble(P95Aiu * 2.0)) | project Rule='high-aiu', CurrentThreshold=50000000000.0, SuggestedThreshold, P50=P50Aiu, P95=P95Aiu, P99=P99Aiu, MaxObserved=MaxAiu, SupportingHours=Hours, Rollout='Keep disabled until clean history exists.'), (session_rollup | extend SuggestedThreshold=case(P95Credits * 2.0 > 1.0, todouble(P95Credits * 2.0), 1.0) | project Rule='cost-spike', CurrentThreshold=1.0, SuggestedThreshold, P50=real(null), P95=P95Credits, P99=real(null), MaxObserved=MaxCredits, SupportingHours=Hours, Rollout='Pair with budget review before action groups.'), (session_rollup | extend SuggestedThreshold=case(P95ToolCalls * 2.0 > 25.0, todouble(P95ToolCalls * 2.0), 25.0) | project Rule='runaway-tool-loop', CurrentThreshold=25.0, SuggestedThreshold, P50=real(null), P95=P95ToolCalls, P99=real(null), MaxObserved=todouble(MaxToolCalls), SupportingHours=Hours, Rollout='Review tool permission policy before routing.'), (session_rollup | extend SuggestedThreshold=case(P95Failures > 1.0, todouble(P95Failures), 1.0) | project Rule='failed-spans', CurrentThreshold=0.0, SuggestedThreshold, P50=real(null), P95=P95Failures, P99=real(null), MaxObserved=todouble(MaxFailures), SupportingHours=Hours, Rollout='Review false positives before action groups.'), (content_rollup | project Rule='content-capture', CurrentThreshold=0.0, SuggestedThreshold=0.0, P50=real(null), P95=real(null), P99=real(null), MaxObserved=todouble(coalesce(MaxContentCaptureSignals, 0)), SupportingHours=ContentCaptureHours, Rollout='Keep strict; investigate immediately if nonzero.')

let hourly = AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), ''), fallback_session=strcat(iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['service.name'])), tostring(Properties['service.name']), iff(isnotempty(AppRoleName), AppRoleName, 'agent'))), '_', iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), iff(isnotempty(OperationId), OperationId, 'session')), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm')) | join kind=leftouter (AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), '') | where isnotempty(direct_session) | summarize operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), iff(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) startswith 'azure-mcp-', 'azure-mcp', '')), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type'])  | extend AIU=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.aiu']), Credits=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.cost']) | summarize Failures=countif(Success == false or tostring(Success) =~ 'false' or isnotempty(error)), ToolFailures=countif((operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool)) and (Success == false or tostring(Success) =~ 'false' or isnotempty(error))), ToolCalls=countif(operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool)), AIU=sum(AIU), Credits=sum(Credits) by Conversation=conversation, TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, 1h); let content = union isfuzzy=true AppDependencies, AppTraces | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | summarize ContentCaptureSignals=countif(tostring(Properties['agentops.content_capture.signal']) =~ 'true' or tostring(Properties) has_any ('gen_ai.input.messages', 'gen_ai.output.messages', 'gen_ai.prompt', 'gen_ai.completion', 'github.copilot.message')) by TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | extend Conversation='content-capture-window'; let current_windows = union (hourly | extend Rule='high-aiu', TriggerValue=AIU, CurrentThreshold=50000000000.0), (hourly | extend Rule='cost-spike', TriggerValue=Credits, CurrentThreshold=1.0), (hourly | extend Rule='runaway-tool-loop', TriggerValue=todouble(ToolCalls), CurrentThreshold=25.0), (hourly | extend Rule='failed-spans', TriggerValue=todouble(Failures + ToolFailures), CurrentThreshold=0.0), (content | extend Rule='content-capture', TriggerValue=todouble(ContentCaptureSignals), CurrentThreshold=0.0); let recommendation = current_windows | summarize P95=percentile(TriggerValue, 95), P99=percentile(TriggerValue, 99), CurrentThreshold=take_any(CurrentThreshold) by Rule | extend ProposedThreshold=case(Rule == 'high-aiu', case(P99 * 1.25 > P95 * 2.0, todouble(P99 * 1.25), todouble(P95 * 2.0)), Rule == 'cost-spike', case(P95 * 2.0 > 1.0, todouble(P95 * 2.0), 1.0), Rule == 'runaway-tool-loop', case(P95 * 2.0 > 25.0, todouble(P95 * 2.0), 25.0), Rule == 'failed-spans', case(P95 > 1.0, todouble(P95), 1.0), 0.0) | project Rule, ProposedThreshold; current_windows | join kind=leftouter recommendation on Rule | extend ProposedThreshold=coalesce(ProposedThreshold, CurrentThreshold) | summarize ObservedWindows=count(), CurrentAlertWindows=countif(TriggerValue > CurrentThreshold), ProposedAlertWindows=countif(TriggerValue > ProposedThreshold), MaxObserved=max(TriggerValue), AffectedSessions=dcount(Conversation), CurrentThreshold=take_any(CurrentThreshold), ProposedThreshold=take_any(ProposedThreshold) by Rule | extend WindowDelta=ProposedAlertWindows - CurrentAlertWindows, ExpectedEffect=case(ProposedThreshold > CurrentThreshold, 'fewer-or-equal-alert-windows', ProposedThreshold < CurrentThreshold, 'more-or-equal-alert-windows', 'same-threshold'), ReviewCommand=strcat('agentops alert threshold-simulate --rule ', Rule, ' --threshold ', tostring(ProposedThreshold), ' --owner <owner> --last <lookback>') | project Rule, CurrentThreshold, ProposedThreshold, ObservedWindows, CurrentAlertWindows, ProposedAlertWindows, WindowDelta, MaxObserved, AffectedSessions, ExpectedEffect, ReviewCommand | order by abs(WindowDelta) desc, Rule asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), ''), fallback_session=strcat(iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['service.name'])), tostring(Properties['service.name']), iff(isnotempty(AppRoleName), AppRoleName, 'agent'))), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm')) | join kind=leftouter (AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), iff(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) startswith 'azure-mcp-', 'azure-mcp', '')), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type'])  | summarize Failures=countif(Success == false or tostring(Success) =~ 'false' or isnotempty(error)), ToolFailures=countif((operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool)) and (Success == false or tostring(Success) =~ 'false' or isnotempty(error))) by TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | order by TimeGenerated asc

('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), iff(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) startswith 'azure-mcp-', 'azure-mcp', '')), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type'])  | extend AIU=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.aiu']) | summarize AIU=sum(AIU) by TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | order by TimeGenerated asc

let hourly = AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), iff(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) startswith 'azure-mcp-', 'azure-mcp', '')), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type'])  | extend AIU=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.aiu']), Credits=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.cost']) | summarize Started=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated), Spans=count(), Failures=countif(Success == false or tostring(Success) =~ 'false' or isnotempty(error)), ToolFailures=countif((operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool)) and (Success == false or tostring(Success) =~ 'false' or isnotempty(error))), ToolCalls=countif(operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool)), AIU=sum(AIU), Credits=sum(Credits), Tools=make_set_if(tool, isnotempty(tool), 10), Errors=make_set_if(error, isnotempty(error), 10) by Conversation=conversation, TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, 1h); let content = union isfuzzy=true AppDependencies, AppTraces | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | summarize Started=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated), ContentCaptureSignals=countif(tostring(Properties['agentops.content_capture.signal']) =~ 'true' or tostring(Properties) has_any ('gen_ai.input.messages', 'gen_ai.output.messages', 'gen_ai.prompt', 'gen_ai.completion', 'github.copilot.message')) by TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | extend Conversation='content-capture-window'; let alert_history = union (hourly | extend Rule='high-aiu', TriggerValue=AIU, Threshold=50000000000.0, Reason='hourly AIU exceeded static proposal threshold' | where TriggerValue > Threshold), (hourly | extend Rule='cost-spike', TriggerValue=Credits, Threshold=1.0, Reason='hourly Copilot credits exceeded static proposal threshold' | where TriggerValue > Threshold), (hourly | extend Rule='runaway-tool-loop', TriggerValue=todouble(ToolCalls), Threshold=25.0, Reason='tool calls exceeded static proposal threshold' | where TriggerValue > Threshold), (hourly | extend Rule='failed-spans', TriggerValue=todouble(Failures + ToolFailures), Threshold=0.0, Reason='failed spans or tools observed' | where TriggerValue > Threshold), (content | extend Rule='content-capture', TriggerValue=todouble(ContentCaptureSignals), Threshold=0.0, Reason='content-like telemetry attributes observed', Spans=long(null), Failures=long(null), ToolFailures=long(null), ToolCalls=long(null), AIU=real(null), Credits=real(null), Tools=dynamic([]), Errors=dynamic([]) | where TriggerValue > Threshold); alert_history | extend ReviewCommand=strcat('agentops alert review --rule ', Rule, ' --session ', Conversation, ' --owner <owner> --last <lookback>') | project TimeGenerated, Rule, Conversation, TriggerValue, Threshold, Reason, ReviewCommand, Started, LastSeen, Spans, Failures, ToolFailures, ToolCalls, AIU, Credits, Tools, Errors | order by TimeGenerated desc, TriggerValue desc | take 100
